title: Robo Turtle Robotic Swimming Turtle Age 3+ by ZURU, Swims, Battery Powered, bath Toy(2 Pack, Green & Pink)
features: ZURU ROBO ALIVE: Drop your ROBO ALIVE in the water and watch it come to life with ZURU's advanced water-activated technology! These fish swim in 5 different directions and dive up to 6 feet!
REALISTIC HYPER - ROBO ALIVE looks and moves like it's real, allowing you to joke around with your friends and family over and over again.
ADVANCED TECHNOLOGY: ALIVE-Advance 'energy saving' theft; turn off after 4 minutes
PACKAGE INCLUDES: 1 x Robo Turtle, 1 x Instruction Manual Batteries included.
ZURU ROBO ALIVE: ROBO ALIVE introduces robotic pets that work, move and act like they are real! They are more than alive, they are ROBO ALIVE!
